/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/skybox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/enginetest.dir/src/grid.cpp.o -o enginetest  libglad.a -lglfw -lGL -ldl -lassimp
